$schema-comment: Sub-project status seed. Updated on milestone-close PRs per spec §2.13. Statuses: not-started | in-progress | complete. Counts are taken from the implementation plans committed under docs/superpowers/plans/.

subProjects.name: Project Infrastructure
subProjects.summary: Repo migration, GitHub config, branch protection, CI stub, hook chain, Netlify wiring (2 projects), 2 Supabase projects, GitHub Pages dashboard, methodology playbook.

subProjects.name: Foundation
subProjects.summary: RR v7 scaffold, Drizzle schema (15 tables) + initial migration, 32 RLS policies + JWT custom-access-token hook, dev seed, login flow with role-aware admin/employer shells, admin CLI, intern identity lookup, full test pyramid, real CI pipeline (supabase start for integration), Netlify build config.

subProjects.name: Admin Core
subProjects.summary: Admin shell with brand-correct nav/footer/toasts/modals/settings rail, full CRUD on Employers/Cohorts/Roles with parent-child URLs, inline-editable Phases + Barriers lists with diff-based saves, singleton Program Info form, Intern records (create + edit) with entry assessment + 90/180-day outcomes, Admin Home KPIs + recent-activity, branded 404, and one Playwright admin CRUD smoke covering the critical path.

subProjects.name: Question Engine
subProjects.summary: 6 question-type renderers, set editor with accordion-collapse fix, 3-tier competency stitching (program-core + cohort overlay + intern overlay), verbatim seed content for all 5 forms, admin routes for set + cohort-tier + intern-tier editing, Playwright editor smoke.

subProjects.name: Assessment Forms
subProjects.summary: All 5 assessment forms on the engine. Intern HMAC-signed identity cookie with revalidation. Anonymous submission via service-role bypass. One-shot enforcement at loader + action layers. Admin competency + exit-employer-survey + self-assessment-results viewer with soft-delete. UUID querystring validation pattern. CLAUDE.md handoff section.

subProjects.name: Employer Shell
subProjects.summary: Branded auth pages (login/forgot/reset/accept/callback) with navy/cyan/gold tokens. Supabase magic-link invite flow with admin-side provisioning UI (invite/resend/cancel/revoke). Email template builders. Employer shell with nav/footer/KPI dashboard, scoped cohorts + interns lists + records, competency self-service (new/edit/detail), exit-employer-survey upsert, profile edit, roles CRUD. 5 new RLS tests + 4 employer-profile/roles RLS tests + 2 Playwright specs. Task 37 (admin-invite E2E) deferred to SP6.

subProjects.name: Polish & Launch
subProjects.summary: Phases C-J remaining: Reports stub, Resend wiring, Sentry, Playwright CI un-gate (incl. deferred Task 37 admin-invite E2E), a11y audit, perf audit, prod seed, launch cutover. Visual fidelity to prototype now handled by SP7 (closed 2026-05-19). Phase J Netlify wiring partially pulled forward via PR #102 (adapter installed; GitHub auto-deploy connection still pending UI work). (Netlify publish-dir-flip cutover task is obsolete — each repo has its own Netlify project.)

subProjects.name: Frontend Rebuild
subProjects.summary: Pixel-for-pixel rebuild of every production route against the locked prototype, spanning 9 phases (A through I) shipped 2026-05-15 through 2026-05-19: foundation tokens/global/print, shared presentation primitives (20+ components + dev gallery), form primitives (AssessmentForm, CompetencyAssessmentForm, QuestionSetEditor, InlineEditableList), public+intern flow rebuild, admin shell+Settings (2 PRs), admin Interns+Assessments (10 routes), employer shell (14 routes), test-harness regression sweep (7 stacked spec bugs root-caused, 22/22 Playwright passing), close-out. Visual-fidelity audit doc closed with 75 side-by-side prototype/production screenshots in 2026-05-19-final/. Adapter wired (@netlify/vite-plugin-react-router) and first Netlify draft preview went live during the regression sweep. Two post-G8 walkthrough fixes shipped (meta-strip first-column padding + admin first-name validator). Subagent-driven phase execution with worktree isolation became the dominant workflow.
